JSON schema for defining valid Pebble project types including native-app, rocky-app, and package.

# Purpose
The JSON schema defines the structure and validation rules for different types of Pebble projects. It specifies three project types: `native-app`, `rocky-app`, and `package`, each with its own set of properties and required fields. For `native-app` and `rocky-app`, properties include `displayName`, `uuid`, `sdkVersion`, and `projectType`, with additional attributes like `enableMultiJS`, `targetPlatforms`, and `capabilities`. The `package` type includes properties such as `sdkVersion`, `projectType`, and `targetPlatforms`. The schema uses references to an external file, `attributes.json`, to ensure consistency in attributes like `uuid`, `sdkVersion`, and `capabilities`. This schema ensures that each project type adheres to a defined structure, facilitating validation and interoperability within the Pebble development environment.
